title.en: But I never expected that it was born.

content.en:
The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor is very fond of his son, although he has many sons, and there are many who are more talented than the Black Pupil Holy Son, but he just loves this son more, so he even gives him a holy relic like the Black Heavenly Armor.

In addition, he also gave the Black Pupil Holy Son's mutilated version of the Imperial Ancestor Method, allowing him to rely on this incomplete Imperial Ancestor Method to practice the Defensive Domain Technique, so that his life-saving ability was greatly increased.

He felt that it was impossible for the Black Pupil Holy Son to fall, so it was not a big deal to put the crippled Imperial Ancestor Law on the Black Pupil Holy Son.

Moreover, the Black Pupil Holy Son still has the Blood-Devouring Wooden Spear on his body, and it is almost impossible for him to be born when he enters the Holy Gold Realm.

But I never expected that it was born.

Moreover, if the incomplete Imperial Ancestor Law is lost, he is equivalent to losing the Imperial Ancestor Method.

The Ancestral Law is different from the general lineage, if it is not thoroughly practiced, there must be the original Ancestor Method before you can continue to participate in enlightenment, otherwise there will be no way to participate in enlightenment and cultivation.

Moreover, once someone has practiced an Ancestor Method, the second person will not be able to break through to the Ancestor Realm with the help of this Ancestor Method, and they must wait for that Ancestor to fall before they can hope to be promoted to the Ancestor.

Otherwise, wouldn't a force that has an ancestral law inheritance become an ancestor?

Then the Ancestral Law is not so precious!

What is really precious is the Ancestral Law left by those fallen ancestors, and as for the Ancestor who is still alive, even if the Ancestor Law is really left, it is at most used to assist in cultivation, comprehend the Holy Technique, or use the Ancestor Method to comprehend the path of the Ancestor and try to create the Ancestor Law by himself.

But under normal circumstances, the living ancestor is not willing to leave the ancestor method, in that case, wouldn't it be to show his own ancestor path, and it is easy to expose his weaknesses and flaws.

Therefore, the Ancestral Law is extremely rare.

And that mutilated Imperial Ancestor Method, its ancestor has fallen, it is an ownerless Ancestor Method, and you can use this Broken Ancestor Method to break through to a half-step ancestor, its value is too precious.

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor had never thought about whether to enter the Half-Step Ancestor, but he was unwilling, and he was afraid that one day he would not be able to help but cultivate the Ancestor Law and impact the Half-Step Ancestor, so he would give the incomplete Ancestor Law to his son, so that he would not be entangled.

Because of this, the fall of his son, coupled with the loss of the Ancestral Law, made him so angry.

"Who the hell is that Holy Giver in the Dark Sanctuary?"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor asked.

The Holy Giver of the Dark Destruction Domain manifested Ye Tian's appearance, but as for Ye Tian's identity, they didn't know.

After all, there is no information exchange between the Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Sanctuary Domain, a new saint endowment, where do they know the identity of the other party!

"Damn, one day, I'll find you and kill you!"

The Nine Shadows Ice Ancestor remembered Ye Tian's appearance and said angrily.

-----------------

"It's back!"

Ye Tian found that he had left the Holy Gold Realm and returned to the Human Realm.

As for the Shengjinjie token, it has long been gone, and it was obviously recovered by the Shengjinjie and is a one-time token.

But this time the harvest was too great, and that token was too worthwhile.

A large number of holy medicines, as well as a lot of ancestral medicines, holy relics, and a mutilated ancestor method, I am afraid that even the Invincible Domain Ancestor will be jealous of Ye Tian's chances.

Of course.

This time, he also exposed a lot of secrets, such as many holy skills.

Even if the people of the Dark Destruction Domain knew, they didn't dare to come to the Dark Sanctuary after all, unless it was a time of war, it would have no effect on him.

But if the lightly-clothed saint knows, it means that the light-clothed saint will inform the saint door, and maybe the saint will also know.

Of course, the light-clothed saintess may not say it, after all, he saved the life of the light-clothed saintess.

"No matter, let's use those holy medicines and ancestral medicines to improve your family's cultivation first!"

Ye Tian planned.

Subsequently.

Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue all obtained a lot of holy medicines, and even one of them obtained an ancestral medicine.

Some of the holy medicines would also help to promote the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao, and they would be able to break through to the Realm of Perfection by cultivating to the Realm of Perfection, and then they would be qualified to impact the Domain Ancestor level.

And Ye Tian didn't take any ancestral medicine, his cultivation has now reached the realm of unity, and it would be a waste to take the ancestral medicine again.

He was going to use the Ancestor Method of the Incomplete Emperor to first cultivate the Holy Armor Sacred Technique to the consummation realm.

Year after year, Ye Tian's Holy Armor Saint Technique continued to improve.

In the blink of an eye, nearly 10 million years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tiancai cultivated the Holy Armor Saint Technique to the consummation realm.

So far, Ye Tian has three Perfection Realm Holy Skills, which are the Holy Armor Holy Technique, the Golden Silk Holy Technique, and the Void Slash Holy Technique.

However, with only three consummation holy techniques, Ye Tian was still not satisfied, and he still wanted to comprehend more consummation realms.

"I have the Void Ancestor Method, as well as the Broken Imperial Ancestor Method, and I can completely cultivate other spatial saint techniques and defensive saint techniques, so that I can add a few more consummation saint techniques!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, the Holy Skill Inheritance is very precious, and he can only obtain the Holy Skill Inheritance from the Battle Gate.

But how could he obtain the Divine Skill Inheritance?

Before, in order to cultivate him, the battle gate gave him a lot of holy skills.

But now, the holy war has passed, and it is unlikely that he will ask the battle gate for the holy skill again.

If everyone wanted the inheritance of holy skills, then the inheritance of holy skills of the battle gate would have been empty long ago.

"Then you can only use the incomplete version of the Imperial Ancestor Method to exchange the Holy Technique. Anyway, this thing is of little use to me, it can only be used to assist in the comprehension of the defensive holy technique, and after the defensive holy skill is completed, it will be of little use to me, and it is not bad to trade it out to obtain benefits!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Battle Realm Tower and applied to see the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

As for the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, he was not qualified to participate in such a transaction.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, do you want to see me?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

If it were an ordinary Holy Son, he would not see each other at all, unless he took the initiative to find the other party.

But Ye Tian is not an ordinary holy son, he is the first holy son of the battle gate, he is very demonic, and he is a holy endower, and there is a great possibility that he will grow to his level in the future, so he came to see Ye Tian.

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, I want to get a large amount of Holy Skill Inheritance from the Battle Gate!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor was a little unhappy, feeling that Ye Tian was too greedy, and couldn't help but say coldly: "A large number of Holy Skill Inheritance, although you are the First Holy Son, you don't have this qualification!"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "I won't get the Holy Skill Inheritance from the Battle Gate for free, I'm going to exchange one thing for it!"

"What's that?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to come up with anything good.

"What about the Ancestral Law?"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"What !!!!"

The Fire Pattern War Ancestor's expression changed drastically, and he couldn't calm down.

Ancestral Law, that's what he dreamed of!
